title: Try-Catch Block
description: Gracefully handle an exception using a try-catch structure.
problemStatement:
Don't let errors crash your app! Write a `try-catch` block that attempts to `throw new Exception("Oops");`. In the `catch` block, print the exception message.

**Expected Output:** `Oops`.
hints: Use `$e->getMessage()` to get the string from an Exception object.
solutionCode:
<?php
try {
    throw new Exception("Oops");
} catch (Exception $e) {
    echo $e->getMessage();
}
?>
